title: argyranthemum frutescens subsp. foeniculaceum
intro: Argyranthemum frutescens subsp. foeniculaceum, commonly known as the French or Pink Daisy, is a plant species that belongs to the daisy family (Asteraceae) and is native to the Mediterranean region. The leaves and flowers of this plant have been used in traditional medicine for their antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antifungal properties, which can be used to treat various health issues such as skin irritations, wounds, and digestive problems. The health benefits of Argyranthemum frutescens subsp. foeniculaceum include reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and its extracts are also used in skincare products due to its antioxidant and soothing properties.
